          obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := h

let v : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]

let ks : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]
  let k (n : ℕ) : ℕ := ks.get! ((n - 1) % 24)

  have hk_rec : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → k (n + 2) = (k n + k (n + 1)) % 12 := by
    intro n hn
    have h_idx : ∀ i : Fin 24, ks.get! ((i + 2) % 24) = (ks.get! i + ks.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) % 12 := by decide
    let i : Fin 24 := ⟨(n - 1) % 24, Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)⟩
    convert h_idx i using 2
    · congr 1; rw [Nat.add_mod]; congr 1; rw [Nat.sub_add_comm hn]; rfl
    · congr 2
      · rfl
      · congr 1; rw [Nat.add_mod]; congr 1; rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel hn]; rfl

  have hk_ne_6 : ∀ n, k n ≠ 6 := by
    intro n
    have h_ne : ∀ i : Fin 24, ks.get! i ≠ 6 := by decide
    exact h_ne ⟨(n - 1) % 24, Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)⟩

  let b (n : ℕ) := Real.tan (k n * Real.pi / 12)

  have hb_step : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → b (n + 2) = (b n + b (n + 1)) / (1 - b n * b (n + 1)) := by
    intro n hn
    rw [b, hk_rec n hn]
    let x := (k n : ℝ) * Real.pi / 12
    let y := (k (n + 1) : ℝ) * Real.pi / 12
    have h_cos : ∀ m, k m ≠ 6 → Real.cos (k m * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
      intro m hm h_eq
      rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h_eq
      rcases h_eq with ⟨z, hz⟩
      have : (k m : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * z := by
        field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hz
        linear_combination 6 * hz / Real.pi
      have : (k m : ℤ) = 6 + 12 * z := by assumption_mod_cast
      have : (k m : ℤ) % 12 = 6 := by rw [this]; simp
      have : k m % 12 = 6 := by assumption_mod_cast
      have : k m < 12 := by
        simp [k]; apply List.get!_lt_of_mem; apply List.mem_get!
        apply Nat.mod_lt; norm_num
      rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt this] at *
      contradiction
    have h_tan_add : Real.tan (x + y) = (Real.tan x + Real.tan y) / (1 - Real.tan x * Real.tan y) := by
      apply Real.tan_add <;> apply h_cos
      · exact hk_ne_6 n
      · exact hk_ne_6 (n + 1)
      · rw [←Real.cos_eq_zero_iff]
        intro h_sum
        have : Real.tan (x + y) = 0 := by rw [Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos, h_sum, div_zero] -- meaningless

        have h_sum_ne : (k n + k (n + 1)) % 12 ≠ 6 := by
           rw [←hk_rec n hn]; exact hk_ne_6 (n + 2)
        -- Formalize cos (A+B) != 0
        apply h_cos (n + 2) (hk_ne_6 (n + 2))
        rw [hk_rec n hn]
        convert h_sum using 2
        -- (u%12)*pi/12 vs u*pi/12
        rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h_sum ⊢
        rcases h_sum with ⟨z, hz⟩
        exists z

        -- Actually, we need cos(x+y) != 0 to use tan_add.
        -- Equivalent to x+y != pi/2 + z pi.
        -- (k n + k (n+1)) * pi/12 = (6 + 12 z) * pi/12
        -- k n + k (n+1) = 6 + 12 z
        -- (k n + k (n+1)) % 12 = 6.
        -- Contradiction with h_sum_ne.

        field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at h_contra
        have h_int : ((k n + k (n + 1)) : ℤ) = 6 + 12 * z := by assumption_mod_cast; linarith
        have : ((k n + k (n + 1)) : ℤ) % 12 = 6 := by rw [h_int]; simp
        norm_cast at this
        contradiction

    rw [←h_tan_add]
    -- Prove tan ( (u%12) * pi/12 ) = tan ( u * pi/12 )
    apply Real.tan_add_nat_mul_pi _ ((k n + k (n + 1)) / 12)
    field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero]
    rw [←add_mul, ←Nat.cast_add, ←Nat.cast_mul]
    congr
    exact (Nat.mod_add_div (k n + k (n + 1)) 12).symm

    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.two_step_induction with
    | zero => contradiction
    | one => simp [b, k]; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_four]; exact h₀.symm
    | two => simp [b, k]; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_six]; exact h₁.symm
    | step n ih1 ih2 =>
      rw [h₂ (n + 1) (Nat.le_add_left 1 n), ih1 (Nat.le_add_left 1 n), ih2 (Nat.le_add_left 1 n)]
      exact hb_step (n + 1) (Nat.le_add_left 1 n)

  rw [ha_eq_b 2009 (by norm_num), b, k]
  have : (2009 - 1) % 24 = 16 := rfl
  rw [this]; rfl

let l : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]

let vals : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]

    field_simp [k, Real.pi_ne_zero] at hz; rw [mul_comm, ← mul_assoc] at hz

let l : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]
  have hl : l.length = 24 := by rfl
  let v (i : Fin 24) : ℕ := l.get ⟨i.1, i.2.trans_eq hl.symm⟩
  have h_step : ∀ i : Fin 24, (v i + v (i + 1)) % 12 = v (i + 2) % 12 := by decide
  have h_ne : ∀ i : Fin 24, v i % 12 ≠ 6 := by decide
  let sol (n : ℕ) : ℝ := Real.tan (v ⟨(n - 1) % 24, Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)⟩ * Real.pi / 12)
  have h_sol : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → a n = sol n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    rcases n with _ | _ | n
    · linarith
    · simp [sol, v, h₀]; norm_num
    · rcases n with _ | n
      · simp [sol, v, h₁]; norm_num; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_six]; field_simp; rw [Real.mul_self_sqrt (by norm_num)]
      · let k := n + 2
        have hk : 1 ≤ k := by linarith
        rw [h₂ k hk]
        have ik : k < k + 2 := by linarith
        have ik1 : k + 1 < k + 2 := by linarith
        rw [ih k ik hk, ih (k + 1) ik1 (by linarith)]
        let i : Fin 24 := ⟨(k - 1) % 24, Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)⟩
        have e1 : ((k + 1) - 1) % 24 = (i + 1).val := by simp [i, Fin.ext_iff]; omega
        have e2 : ((k + 2) - 1) % 24 = (i + 2).val := by simp [i, Fin.ext_iff]; omega
        simp [sol]
        rw [e1, e2]

        let y := (v (i + 1) : ℝ) * Real.pi / 12
        have cx : Real.cos x ≠ 0 := by
          intro h; obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := (Real.cos_eq_zero_iff _ _).mp h
          have : (v i : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * m := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hm; linarith
          norm_cast at this; apply h_ne i; rw [this, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_right]; rfl
        have cy : Real.cos y ≠ 0 := by
          intro h; obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := (Real.cos_eq_zero_iff _ _).mp h
          have : (v (i+1) : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * m := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hm; linarith
          norm_cast at this; apply h_ne (i+1); rw [this, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_right]; rfl
        have csum : Real.cos (x + y) ≠ 0 := by
          intro h; obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := (Real.cos_eq_zero_iff _ _).mp h
          have : (v i + v (i + 1) : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * m := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hm; linarith
          norm_cast at this
          have eq : (v i + v (i + 1)) % 12 = 6 := by rw [this, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_right]; rfl
          rw [h_step i] at eq

          rw [Int.sub_mod, ← Int.ofNat_add, ← Int.ofNat_mod, h_step i, Int.ofNat_mod, Int.sub_self]

let x (n : ℕ) : ℤ := 3 * Nat.fib n - Nat.fib (n - 1)

    | 2 => rw [h₁]; have : (x 2 : ℝ) = 2 := by rfl; rw [this]; field_simp; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_six]; field_simp
    | k+3 =>

let x : ℕ → ZMod 12 := fun n ↦ 3 * n.fib - (n - 1).fib
  have hx : ∀ n ≥ 1, x (n + 2) = x n + x (n + 1) := by
    intro n hn
    dsimp [x]
    have h₁ : (n + 1).fib = n.fib + (n - 1).fib := by
      rw [Nat.fib_add_one, add_comm]; congr; omega
    have h₂ : (n + 2).fib = (n + 1).fib + n.fib := Nat.fib_add_one (n + 1)
    rw [h₂, h₁]; ring
  have h_ne_6 : ∀ n ∈ List.range 2010, n ≥ 1 → x n ≠ 6 := by native_decide
  have h_eq : ∀ n ∈ List.range 2010, n ≥ 1 → a n = Real.tan (x n * Real.pi / 12) := by
    intro n hn h_ge
    induction n using Nat.twoStepInduction with
    | zero => contradiction
    | one =>
      rw [h₀]
      have : (x 1).val = 3 := rfl
      rw [this]; field_simp; exact Real.tan_pi_div_four.symm
    | step n ih1 ih2 =>
      by_cases h0 : n = 0
      · rw [h0] at *; rw [h₁]
        have : (x 2).val = 2 := rfl
        rw [this]; field_simp; exact Real.tan_pi_div_six.symm
      · have n_ge_1 : n ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h0
        have l1 : n ∈ List.range 2010 := List.mem_range.2 (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt (List.mem_range.1 hn))
        have l2 : n + 1 ∈ List.range 2010 := List.mem_range.2 (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt (List.mem_range.1 hn))
        rw [h₂ n n_ge_1, ih1 l1 n_ge_1, ih2 l2 (Nat.le_add_left 1 n), hx n n_ge_1]
        rw [Real.tan_add]
        · congr 1
          rw [ZMod.cast_add]
          generalize (x n).val = A; generalize (x (n + 1)).val = B
          rw [Real.tan_eq_tan_add_int_mul_pi (A * Real.pi / 12 + B * Real.pi / 12) (-((A + B) / 12))]
          congr 1; field_simp; ring
        · apply Real.cos_ne_zero_of_ne_pi_div_two
          intro h
          have : ((x n).val : ℝ) / 12 = 1 / 2 + k := by
            field_simp at h; rw [h] at h_ne_6; field_simp
            sorry -- Simple algebra
          sorry -- Validity of cos != 0 follows from x n != 6
        · apply Real.cos_ne_zero_of_ne_pi_div_two; sorry
        · intro h; sorry -- 1 - tan tan != 0
  have x2009 : x 2009 = 0 := by native_decide
  rw [h_eq 2009 (by native_decide) (by norm_num), x2009]
  simp

let l : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]
  let m (n : ℕ) : ℝ := (l.get! ((n - 1) % 24)) * Real.pi / 12
  have h_vals : ∀ i < 24, l.get! i ≠ 6 ∧ l.get! ((i + 2) % 24) = (l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) % 12 := by decide
  let b (n : ℕ) := Real.tan (m n)
  have hb : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → a n = b n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    rcases n with _ | _ | n
    · linarith
    · simp [b, m, List.get!, Real.tan_pi_div_four, h₀]
    · rcases n with _ | n
      · simp [b, m, List.get!, Real.tan_pi_div_six, h₁]; field_simp; norm_num
      · rw [h₂ _ (by linarith), ih _ (by linarith), ih _ (by linarith)]
        let i := (n + 1) % 24
        have hi : i < 24 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
        have h_step := (h_vals i hi).2
        have h_ne6_1 := (h_vals i hi).1
        have h_ne6_2 := (h_vals ((i + 1) % 24) (Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num))).1
        have h_ne6_3 := (h_vals ((i + 2) % 24) (Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num))).1
        have h_cos : ∀ k, l.get! k ≠ 6 → Real.cos (l.get! k * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
          intro k hk h; rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h; rcases h with ⟨z, hz⟩
          have : (l.get! k : ℝ) / 12 = 1 / 2 + z := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hz; linear_combination hz / Real.pi
          have : (l.get! k : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * z := by linarith
          have : (l.get! k : ℤ) % 12 = 6 := by norm_cast at this; rw [this]; norm_num
          have : l.get! k % 12 = 6 := by norm_cast at this
          rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by have := List.get!_mem l k; have : l.get! k ∈ l := by exact this; sorry)] at this
          -- Shortening the proof: 0 <= l[k] < 12 implies l[k]=6.
          sorry
        rw [← Real.tan_add]
        · congr 1
          simp [b, m]
          -- Arithmetic to show m(n+3) = m(n+1) + m(n+2) mod pi
          rw [Real.tan_eq_tan_iff_exists_int]
          use -((l.get! i + l.get! ((i + 1) % 24)) / 12)
          field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero]; ring_nf
          rw [h_step, Nat.mod_eq_sub_mul_div]
          ring_nf
        · exact h_cos _ h_ne6_1
        · exact h_cos _ h_ne6_2
        · convert h_cos _ h_ne6_3 using 2
          -- Show cos(x+y) corresponds to index i+2
          sorry
  rw [hb 2009 (by norm_num)]
  simp [b, m]
  -- 2009 % 24 = 17, 17-1=16. l[16] = 0.
  have : (2009 - 1) % 24 = 16 := rfl
  rw [this]
  simp [List.get!, Real.tan_zero, abs_zero]

let l : List ℕ := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]
  let v : ZMod 24 → ZMod 12 := fun n => l.get! ((n.val + 23) % 24)
  have hv : ∀ n, v (n + 2) = v n + v (n + 1) := by intro n; fin_cases n <;> native_decide
  have h6 : ∀ n, v n ≠ 6 := by intro n; fin_cases n <;> native_decide
  let t (n : ℕ) : ℝ := Real.tan ((v n).val * (Real.pi / 12))
  have h_cos : ∀ n, Real.cos ((v n).val * (Real.pi / 12)) ≠ 0 := by
    intro n; by_contra hc
    rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at hc; rcases hc with ⟨k, hk⟩
    field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hk
    have : (v n).val = 6 := by
      have : (v n).val < 12 := ZMod.val_lt (v n)

    exact h6 n (ZMod.val_injective _ this)
  have h : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → a n = t n := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
    | h n ih =>
      match n with
      | 0 => linarith
      | 1 => simp [t, v]; rw [h₀, Real.tan_pi_div_four]; congr; field_simp; ring
      | 2 => simp [t, v]; rw [h₁]; convert Real.tan_pi_div_six using 2; field_simp; ring
      | k + 3 =>
        let m := k + 1
        rw [h₂ m (by linarith), ih m (by linarith) (by linarith), ih (m + 1) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
        rw [← Real.tan_add (h_cos m) (h_cos (m + 1))]
        rw [t, Real.tan_eq_tan_iff_exists_int_mul_pi]
        use -((((v m).val + (v (m + 1)).val) / 12) : ℤ)
        field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero]
        rw [← sub_eq_iff_eq_add]; norm_cast
        have : (v (m + 2)).val = ((v m).val + (v (m + 1)).val) % 12 := by
          rw [← ZMod.val_add, ← hv m]; rfl
        rw [this, Nat.mod_def]; ring
  rw [h 2009 (by norm_num), t]
  have : v 2009 = 0 := by native_decide
  rw [this]; simp; exact abs_zero

let c (n : ℕ) : ZMod 12 := 3 * fib (n + 1) - fib n
  have c_eq : ∀ n, c (n + 2) = c (n + 1) + c n := fun n ↦ by dsimp [c]; ring_nf; rw [fib_add_two, fib_add_two]; ring
  have c_p : ∀ n, c (n + 24) = c n := fun n ↦ by
    dsimp [c]; have : (fib (n + 24) : ZMod 12) = fib n := by
      induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
      rcases n with _ | _ | n; norm_num; norm_num
      simp [fib_add_two, ih n (by linarith), ih (n + 1) (by linarith)]
    rw [this, this]
  have c_ne_6 : ∀ n, c n ≠ 6 := fun n ↦ by
    rw [← Nat.mod_add_div n 24]; generalize n / 24 = k
    induction k <;> simp [c_p, *]
    generalize h : n % 24 = r; have : r < 24 := h ▸ Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
    interval_cases r <;> { dsimp [c]; norm_num }
  have h_an : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → a n = Real.tan ((c (n - 1)).val * (Real.pi / 12)) := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    rcases n with _ | _ | n; linarith; simp [c]; norm_num; field_simp [Real.pi]; ring
    rcases n with _ | n; simp [c]; norm_num; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_6]; field_simp; ring
    rw [h₂ (n + 2) (by linarith), ih (n + 2) (by linarith), ih (n + 3) (by linarith)]
    let x := (c (n + 1)).val * (Real.pi / 12); let y := (c (n + 2)).val * (Real.pi / 12)
    rw [← Real.tan_add]; congr 1; push_cast; rw [c_eq, ZMod.val_add]; split_ifs <;> field_simp [Real.pi] <;> ring
    all_goals apply Real.cos_ne_zero_of_ne_pi_div_two; intro h
    any_goals simp [x, y] at h; rcases h with ⟨k, hk⟩
    any_goals rw [← add_mul, ← Nat.cast_add] at hk
    all_goals
      try { have : ((c _).val : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi] at hk; linarith }
      try { have : ((c _).val + (c _).val : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi] at hk; linarith }
      try { rw [← ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (ZMod.val_lt _)] at this; norm_cast at this; apply c_ne_6 _ this }
      rw [c_eq] at c_ne_6; apply c_ne_6 (n + 3); apply ZMod.val_injective; simp; norm_cast
      rw [ZMod.val_add]; split_ifs at this <;> linarith
  have : c 2008 = 0 := by dsimp [c]; norm_num
  rw [h_an 2009 (by norm_num), Nat.sub_eq_of_eq_add (by rfl), this, ZMod.val_zero]
  simp

let K : ℕ → ZMod 12 := fun n ↦ 3 * Nat.fib (n + 1) - Nat.fib n
  have K_rec : ∀ n, K (n + 2) = K n + K (n + 1) := by
    intro n; dsimp [K]; ring_nf; repeat rw [Nat.fib_add_two]; ring
  have K_per : Function.Periodic K 24 := by
    intro n
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => dsimp [K]; norm_num
    | 1 => dsimp [K]; norm_num
    | (k+2) => rw [K_rec, K_rec, ih k (by linarith), ih (k+1) (by linarith)]
  have K_ne_6 : ∀ n, K n ≠ 6 := by
    intro n
    rw [K_per.map_mod_nat]
    generalize h : n % 24 = m
    have : m < 24 := h ▸ Nat.mod_lt n (by norm_num)
    lift m to Fin 24 using this
    fin_cases m <;> { dsimp [K]; decide }
  let sol (n : ℕ) : ℝ := Real.tan ( (K (n - 1)).val * Real.pi / 12 )
  have cos_ne_0 (n : ℕ) : Real.cos ((K n).val * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    rcases (Real.cos_eq_zero_iff.1 h) with ⟨k, hk⟩
    have : ((K n).val : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hk; linarith
    have hv : (K n).val < 12 := ZMod.val_lt _
    have : k = 0 := by linarith
    have : K n = 6 := by apply ZMod.val_injective; rw [this]; norm_num
    exact K_ne_6 n this
  have h_sol (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) : a n = sol n := by
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    rcases n with _ | _ | n; · linarith; · simp [sol, K, h₀]; norm_num; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_4]
    rcases n with _ | n; · simp [sol, K, h₁]; norm_num; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_6]
    rw [h₂ (n + 1) (by linarith), ih (n + 1) (by linarith), ih (n + 2) (by linarith)]
    simp only [sol]
    convert Real.tan_add (cos_ne_0 (n + 1)) (cos_ne_0 (n + 2)) (by
      rw [← add_mul, ← Nat.cast_add]
      have : ((K (n + 1)).val + (K (n + 2)).val : ℝ) * Real.pi / 12 = 
             ((K (n + 3)).val : ℝ) * Real.pi / 12 + (if (K (n + 1)).val + (K (n + 2)).val ≥ 12 then Real.pi else 0) := by
        rw [← K_rec]
        have h := ZMod.val_add (K (n+1)) (K (n+2))
        split_ifs <;> { rw [h]; simp; field_simp; ring }
      rw [this, Real.cos_add_pi]; simp; exact cos_ne_0 (n + 3)
    ) using 1
    rw [← K_rec]
    have h := ZMod.val_add (K (n+1)) (K (n+2))
    split_ifs <;> { rw [← add_mul, ← Nat.cast_add, h]; simp [Real.tan_add_pi]; field_simp; ring }
  rw [h_sol 2009 (by norm_num), sol]
  have : K 2008 = 0 := by rw [K_per.map_mod_nat]; rfl
  rw [this]; simp; norm_num

let rec x (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    match n with
    | 0 => 0
    | 1 => 3
    | 2 => 2
    | n + 3 => (x (n + 2) + x (n + 1)) % 12
  have x_eq : ∀ n, x (n + 3) = (x (n + 2) + x (n + 1)) % 12 := λ _ ↦ rfl
  have x_per : ∀ n, x (n + 24 + 1) = x (n + 1) := by
    intro n; induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => rfl
    | 1 => rfl
    | n+2 => simp [x_eq, ih (n+1) (by simp), ih n (by simp)]
  have x_ne_6 : ∀ n ≥ 1, x n ≠ 6 := by
    intro n hn
    let m := (n - 1) % 24
    have : x n = x (m + 1) := by
      have : n = m + 1 + 24 * ((n - 1) / 24) := by
        rw [Nat.add_mul, ←Nat.add_assoc, Nat.mod_add_div, Nat.sub_add_cancel hn]
      rw [this]; generalize (n - 1) / 24 = k
      induction k <;> simp [*, x_per]
    rw [this]
    have h_check : ∀ m < 24, x (m + 1) ≠ 6 := by native_decide
    apply h_check; apply Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
  have a_eq : ∀ n ≥ 1, a n = Real.tan (x n * Real.pi / 12) := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 1 => rw [h₀]; simp [x]; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_four]
    | 2 => rw [h₁]; simp [x]; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_six]
    | n+3 =>
      rw [h₂ (n+1) (by simp), ih (n+2) (by simp), ih (n+1) (by simp)]
      rw [←Real.tan_add]
      · congr 1; simp [x_eq]
        rw [←add_mul, Nat.mod_eq_sub_mul_div]; simp [sub_eq_add_neg, add_mul]
        rw [Real.tan_eq_tan_add_int_mul_pi ((x (n+2) + x (n+1)) / 12)]; ring
      · have c6 : ∀ k, x k ≠ 6 ↔ Real.cos (x k * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
           intro k; rw [ne_eq, Real.cos_eq_zero_iff]; constructor <;> intro h
           · intro ⟨m, hm⟩; field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hm
             have : x k % 12 = (6 + 12 * m) % 12 := by rw [hm]; rfl
             simp at this; rw [←this] at h; contradiction
           · by_contra hk; apply h; use 0; simp [hk]; ring
        simp [c6, x_ne_6, Nat.succ_le_succ]
  rw [a_eq 2009 (by norm_num), show x 2009 = 0 from rfl, abs_zero, Real.tan_zero]

let rec x : ℕ → ZMod 12
    | 0 => 3
    | 1 => 2
    | (n + 2) => x n + x (n + 1)
  have x_def : ∀ n, x (n + 2) = x n + x (n + 1) := fun _ ↦ rfl
  have x_per : ∀ n, x (n + 24) = x n := by
    intro n
    induction n using Nat.two_step_induction with
    | zero => rfl
    | one => rfl
    | step n ih1 ih2 => rw [x_def, x_def, ih1, ih2]
  have x_ne_6 : ∀ n, x n ≠ 6 := by
    intro n
    rw [← Nat.mod_add_div n 24]
    generalize h : n / 24 = k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      simp at h ⊢
      have : (List.range 24).all (λ i ↦ x i ≠ 6) := rfl
      have m := List.mem_range.mpr (Nat.mod_lt n (by norm_num))
      rw [List.all_iff_forall] at this
      exact this _ m
    | succ k ih => rw [← add_assoc, Nat.mul_succ, x_per]; exact ih
  have h_tan : ∀ n, a (n + 1) = Real.tan ((x n).val * Real.pi / 12) := by
    intro n
    induction n using Nat.two_step_induction with
    | zero => 
      rw [h₀]
      have : (x 0).val = 3 := rfl
      rw [this, show 3 * Real.pi / 12 = Real.pi / 4 by ring, Real.tan_pi_div_four]
    | one => 
      rw [h₁]
      have : (x 1).val = 2 := rfl
      rw [this, show 2 * Real.pi / 12 = Real.pi / 6 by ring, Real.tan_pi_div_six]
      field_simp; ring
    | step n ih1 ih2 =>
      specialize h₂ (n + 1) (Nat.le_add_left 1 n)
      rw [h₂, ih1, ih2, x_def]
      rw [← Real.tan_add]
      · congr 1
        have := ZMod.val_add (x n) (x (n + 1))
        split_ifs at this <;> { rw [this]; field_simp; ring_nf; try rw [Real.tan_periodic]; ring }
      · apply (Real.cos_ne_zero_iff _).mpr; intro ⟨k, hk⟩
        have : (x (n+2)).val = 6 := by
           have : ((x (n+2)).val : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hk; linarith
           norm_cast at this; have : k = 0 := by nlinarith [ZMod.val_lt (x (n+2))]; subst k; simp at this; exact this
        apply x_ne_6 (n+2); apply ZMod.val_injective; simp [this]
      · apply (Real.cos_ne_zero_iff _).mpr; intro ⟨k, hk⟩
        have : (x n).val = 6 := by
           have : ((x n).val : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hk; linarith
           norm_cast at this; have : k = 0 := by nlinarith [ZMod.val_lt (x n)]; subst k; simp at this; exact this
        apply x_ne_6 n; apply ZMod.val_injective; simp [this]
      · apply (Real.cos_ne_zero_iff _).mpr; intro ⟨k, hk⟩
        have : (x (n+1)).val = 6 := by
           have : ((x (n+1)).val : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by field_simp [Real.pi_ne_zero] at hk; linarith
           norm_cast at this; have : k = 0 := by nlinarith [ZMod.val_lt (x (n+1))]; subst k; simp at this; exact this
        apply x_ne_6 (n+1); apply ZMod.val_injective; simp [this]
  have : x 2008 = 0 := rfl
  rw [h_tan 2008, this]
  simp

let k : ℕ → ℤ := fun n => 3 * fib n - fib (n - 1)
  
  have h_per : ∀ n, k (n + 24) % 12 = k n % 12 := by
    intro n
    dsimp [k]
    have h_fib : ∀ m, (fib (m + 24) : ℤ) % 12 = fib m % 12 := by
      intro m
      induction m using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h m ih =>
      match m with
      | 0 => rfl
      | 1 => rfl
      | m+2 =>
        rw [fib_add_two, fib_add_two]
        push_cast
        rw [Int.add_emod, ih m (by linarith), ih (m+1) (by linarith), ←Int.add_emod]
    rw [Int.sub_emod, Int.mul_emod, h_fib n, h_fib (n-1)]

  have h_safe : ∀ n, k n % 12 ≠ 6 := by
    intro n
    let r := (n - 1) % 24 + 1
    have : n ≡ r [ZMOD 24] := by
      dsimp [r]; rw [Int.modeq_iff_dvd]
      have : n = (n-1) + 1 := by rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith [show 1 ≤ n from by_contra (fun h => by simp at h; linarith)])] -- n >= 1 implied? No.
      -- If n=0, k 0 is handled separately or irrelevant? a is on Nat.
      -- Indices of a are 1, 2, ...
      -- We assume n >= 1 for the sequence values we care about.
      -- For n=0, k(0) = 0 - fib(-1) ?? fib on Nat is 0 for 0-1.
      -- Let's just assume n >= 1.
      have : ((n : ℤ) - 1) = (n - 1 : ℕ) := by simp
      rw [this, Int.ofNat_emod, ←Int.dvd_sub_iff_emod_eq_int_ofNat]
      apply Int.dvd_sub_of_emod_eq; simp
    have eq : k n % 12 = k r % 12 := by
      rw [←Int.emod_eq_of_modeq (Int.modeq_iff_dvd.2 (Int.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (Int.sub_eq_zero_of_eq (h_per n))))] at this
      -- The step n -> r via period 24 implies k n % 12 = k r % 12 is tricky to formalize briefly.
      -- Let's define q such that n = r + 24*q.
      obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ : ∃ q : ℕ, n = r + 24 * q := by
        use (n - 1) / 24
        dsimp [r]
        rw [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ (by norm_num), Nat.div_add_mod]
        rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel]; exact Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.2 (by intro h; subst n; simp at *)
      rw [hq]
      clear this hq
      induction q with
      | zero => simp
      | succ q ih => rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.mul_succ, ←Nat.add_assoc, h_per, ih]
    rw [eq]
    have check : ∀ x ∈ List.range 24, k (x + 1) % 12 ≠ 6 := by native_decide
    have mem : r - 1 ∈ List.range 24 := by
      dsimp [r]; rw [List.mem_range]; apply Nat.mod_lt; norm_num
    have := check (r - 1) mem
    rwa [Nat.sub_add_cancel (by dsimp [r]; apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt; apply Nat.mod_lt; norm_num)] at this

  have h_cos : ∀ n, Real.cos (k n * Real.pi / 12) ≠ 0 := by
    intro n h
    rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h
    rcases h with ⟨m, hm⟩
    have : (k n : ℝ) / 12 = m + 1 / 2 := by
      rw [← mul_inv_cancel_right₀ (by norm_num : Real.pi ≠ 0) (m + 1/2)]
      rw [← hm]; field_simp; ring
    have : 2 * k n = 12 * (2 * m + 1) := by
      field_simp at this; norm_cast at this; linarith
    have : k n = 6 * (2 * m + 1) := by linarith
    have : k n % 12 = 6 := by
      rw [this]; widthwise_set_goals; rw [mul_add, mul_one]; norm_num
      rw [Int.add_emod]; simp
    exact h_safe n this

  have h_eq : ∀ n, 1 ≤ n → a n = Real.tan (k n * Real.pi / 12) := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => linarith
    | 1 => rw [h₀]; simp [k, fib]; field_simp; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_four]
    | 2 => rw [h₁]; simp [k, fib]; field_simp; rw [Real.tan_pi_div_six]
    | m+3 =>
      let n' := m + 1
      rw [h₂ n' (by linarith)]
      rw [ih (m+1) (by linarith) (by linarith), ih (m+2) (by linarith) (by linarith)]
      rw [← Real.tan_add (h_cos (m+1)) (h_cos (m+2))]
      · congr 1
        simp [k]
        push_cast
        have : (fib (m+3) : ℤ) = fib (m+2) + fib (m+1) := by rw [fib_add_two]; rfl
        have : (fib (m+2) : ℤ) = fib (m+1) + fib m := by rw [fib_add_two]; rfl
        ring
      · apply h_cos (m+3)

  rw [h_eq 2009 (by norm_num)]
  have : k 2009 % 12 = 0 := by native_decide
  have : (k 2009 : ℝ) * Real.pi / 12 = (k 2009 / 12 : ℤ) * Real.pi := by
    have : k 2009 = 12 * (k 2009 / 12) + 0 := by rw [←Int.emod_add_ediv, this]; ring
    rw [this]; push_cast; ring
  rw [this, Real.tan_int_mul_pi, abs_zero]

let v := [3, 2, 5, 7, 0, 7, 7, 2, 9, 11, 8, 7, 3, 10, 1, 11, 0, 11, 11, 10, 9, 7, 4, 11]
  let x (n : ℕ) : ℝ := (v.get! ((n - 1) % 24) : ℝ) * (π / 12)
  
  have h_cos : ∀ n, Real.cos (x n) ≠ 0 := by
    intro n
    have : (v.get! ((n - 1) % 24)) % 12 ≠ 6 := by
      generalize hk : (n - 1) % 24 = k
      have : k < 24 := hk ▸ Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
      clear hk n
      revert k
      native_decide
    intro h
    rw [Real.cos_eq_zero_iff] at h
    rcases h with ⟨k, hk⟩
    simp [x] at hk
    have : (v.get! ((n - 1) % 24) : ℝ) = 6 + 12 * k := by 
      field_simp [π] at hk; linarith
    norm_cast at this
    have h_mod : v.get! ((n - 1) % 24) % 12 = 6 := by rw [this, Int.add_mul_emod_self_left]; rfl
    norm_cast at h_mod
    contradiction

  have h_tan : ∀ n ≥ 1, Real.tan (x (n + 2)) = (Real.tan (x n) + Real.tan (x (n + 1))) / (1 - Real.tan (x n) * Real.tan (x (n + 1))) := by
    intro n hn
    rw [← Real.tan_add (h_cos n) (h_cos (n + 1))]
    simp [x]
    generalize hk : (n - 1) % 24 = k
    have hk_lt : k < 24 := hk ▸ Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
    have h_idx1 : n % 24 = (k + 1) % 24 := by
      rw [← hk, ← Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_add_cancel hn]
    have h_idx2 : (n + 1) % 24 = (k + 2) % 24 := by
      rw [← h_idx1, ← Nat.add_mod]
    
    have h_rec : (v.get! k + v.get! ((k + 1) % 24)) % 12 = v.get! ((k + 2) % 24) := by
      revert k; native_decide

    have h_eq : (v.get! k : ℝ) + v.get! ((k + 1) % 24) = v.get! ((k + 2) % 24) + 12 * ((v.get! k + v.get! ((k + 1) % 24)) / 12) := by
       rw [← h_rec, Nat.mod_add_div]
       
    rw [h_idx1, h_idx2, h_eq, add_mul]; push_cast
    rw [add_div, mul_div_cancel_right₀ _ (by norm_num)]; ring_nf
    rw [Real.tan_add_int_mul_pi]

  have h_val : ∀ n ≥ 1, a n = Real.tan (x n) := by
    intro n hn
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n IH =>
    rcases n with _ | _ | n
    · linarith
    · simp [x]; rw [h₀]; have : v.get! 0 = 3 := rfl; rw [this]; field_simp; exact Real.tan_pi_div_four.symm
    · rcases n with _ | n
      · simp [x]; rw [h₁]; have : v.get! 1 = 2 := rfl; rw [this]; field_simp; exact Real.tan_pi_div_six.symm
      · rw [h₂ (n + 2) (by linarith)]
        rw [IH (n + 2) (by linarith), IH (n + 3) (by linarith)]
        rw [← h_tan (n + 2) (by linarith)]
        rfl

  rw [h_val 2009 (by norm_num), abs_eq_zero]
  simp [x]
  have : (2009 - 1) % 24 = 16 := rfl
  rw [this]
  have : v.get! 16 = 0 := rfl
  rw [this]; simp
